flashcards.definition: Maintenance of a stable internal environment through coordinated organ system activity.
Volume of blood pumped by the heart per minute (HR × SV); increases during exercise.
Autonomic reflex that adjusts heart rate and vascular tone in response to blood pressure changes.
Pancreatic hormone that lowers blood glucose by promoting cellular uptake and glycogen storage.
Adrenal medulla hormone that increases HR, BP, bronchodilation, and glucose — 'fight-or-flight.'
